ddls:
CREATE TABLE "flights" (
  "flight_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each flight */,
  "carrier_code" TEXT /* Code of the carrier operating the flight */,
  "flight_number" INTEGER /* Number of the flight */,
  "tail_number" TEXT /* Tail number of the aircraft */,
  "departure_airport" TEXT /* Airport of departure */,
  "destination_airport" TEXT /* Airport of destination */,
  "scheduled_departure_time" TEXT /* Scheduled departure time */,
  "actual_departure_time" TEXT /* Actual departure time */,
  "scheduled_arrival_time" TEXT /* Scheduled arrival time */,
  "actual_arrival_time" TEXT /* Actual arrival time */,
  "scheduled_elapsed_time" INTEGER /* Scheduled elapsed time in minutes */,
  "actual_elapsed_time" INTEGER /* Actual elapsed time in minutes */,
  "departure_delay" INTEGER /* Departure delay in minutes */,
  "arrival_delay" INTEGER /* Arrival delay in minutes */,
  "flight_date" TEXT /* Date of the flight */,
  "flight_status" TEXT /* Status of the flight (e.g., On Time, Delayed, Cancelled) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("flight_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_flights_departure_airport FOREIGN KEY ("departure_airport") REFERENCES airports ("airport_code"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_flights_destination_airport FOREIGN KEY ("destination_airport") REFERENCES airports ("airport_code"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_flights_carrier_code FOREIGN KEY ("carrier_code") REFERENCES carriers ("carrier_code"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_flights_tail_number FOREIGN KEY ("tail_number") REFERENCES aircrafts ("tail_number")
)

CREATE TABLE "carriers" (
  "carrier_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each carrier */,
  "carrier_code" TEXT /* Code of the carrier */,
  "carrier_name" TEXT /* Name of the carrier */,
  "head_office" TEXT /* Head office location of the carrier */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website of the carrier */,
  "contact_number" TEXT /* Contact number of the carrier */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("carrier_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "aircrafts" (
  "aircraft_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each aircraft */,
  "tail_number" TEXT /* Tail number of the aircraft */,
  "aircraft_model" TEXT /* Model of the aircraft */,
  "manufacture_date" TEXT /* Manufacture date of the aircraft */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Seating capacity of the aircraft */,
  "range" INTEGER /* Range of the aircraft in miles */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("aircraft_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "airports" (
  "airport_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each airport */,
  "airport_code" TEXT /* Code of the airport */,
  "airport_name" TEXT /* Name of the airport */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the airport is located */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the airport is located */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the airport */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the airport */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("airport_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "flight_delays" (
  "delay_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each delay */,
  "flight_id" INTEGER /* ID of the flight delayed */,
  "carrier_delay" INTEGER /* Delay caused by the carrier */,
  "weather_delay" INTEGER /* Delay caused by weather */,
  "national_aviation_system_delay" INTEGER /* Delay caused by national aviation system */,
  "security_delay" INTEGER /* Delay caused by security */,
  "late_aircraft_arrival_delay" INTEGER /* Delay caused by late aircraft arrival */,
  "total_delay" INTEGER /* Total delay time in minutes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("delay_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_flight_delays_flight_id FOREIGN KEY ("flight_id") REFERENCES flights ("flight_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "flight_schedules" (
  "schedule_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each schedule */,
  "flight_id" INTEGER /* ID of the flight */,
  "departure_time" TEXT /* Scheduled departure time */,
  "arrival_time" TEXT /* Scheduled arrival time */,
  "day_of_week" TEXT /* Day of the week the flight is scheduled */,
  "frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of the flight (e.g., Daily, Weekly) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("schedule_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_flight_schedules_flight_id FOREIGN KEY ("flight_id") REFERENCES flights ("flight_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "flight_routes" (
  "route_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each route */,
  "flight_id" INTEGER /* ID of the flight */,
  "departure_airport" TEXT /* Airport of departure */,
  "destination_airport" TEXT /* Airport of destination */,
  "distance" INTEGER /* Distance between the departure and destination airports in miles */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("route_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_flight_routes_flight_id FOREIGN KEY ("flight_id") REFERENCES flights ("flight_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "flight_operations" (
  "operation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each operation */,
  "flight_id" INTEGER /* ID of the flight */,
  "wheels_off_time" TEXT /* Time when wheels went off the ground */,
  "taxi_out_time" INTEGER /* Time taken for taxi-out */,
  "wheels_on_time" TEXT /* Time when wheels touched down */,
  "taxi_in_time" INTEGER /* Time taken for taxi-in */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("operation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_flight_operations_flight_id FOREIGN KEY ("flight_id") REFERENCES flights ("flight_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., flight operations manager, analyst, executive) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for security */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login time of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the system */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Time when the system was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the system */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent (e.g., browser, device) used to access the system */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weather_data" (
  "weather_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weather data */,
  "flight_id" INTEGER /* ID of the flight */,
  "weather_condition" TEXT /* Weather condition */,
  "temperature" REAL /* Temperature */,
  "humidity" REAL /* Humidity */,
  "wind_speed" REAL /* Wind speed */,
  "wind_direction" TEXT /* Wind direction */,
  "precipitation" REAL /* Precipitation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("weather_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_data_flight_id FOREIGN KEY ("flight_id") REFERENCES flights ("flight_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "air_traffic_control_data" (
  "atc_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each air traffic control data */,
  "flight_id" INTEGER /* ID of the flight */,
  "atc_condition" TEXT /* Air traffic control condition */,
  "altitude" REAL /* Altitude */,
  "speed" REAL /* Speed */,
  "visibility" REAL /* Visibility */,
  "runway" TEXT /* Runway used */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("atc_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_air_traffic_control_data_flight_id FOREIGN KEY ("flight_id") REFERENCES flights ("flight_id")
)
